stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Compete the statements for each marshalling signal.

A) Moving extended arms downwards in a ‘patting’ gesture, moving wands up and down from waist to knees indicates _____.
B) Arms and wands fully extended above head, moving wands outward in a 'jabbing' motion indicates _____.
C) Fully extend arms and wands at a 90-degree angle to sides and slowly moving to above head until wands cross indicates _____.
D) Bending extended arms at elbows and moving wands up and down from chest height to head indicates _____.
Ε) Abruptly extend arms and wands to top of head, crossing wands indicates _____.

options.a: A) slow down; B) chocks removed; C) normal stop; D) straight ahead; E) emergency stop
options.b: A) slow down; B) chocks removed; C) emergency stop; D) straight ahead; E) normal stop
options.c: A) straight ahead; B) chocks removed; C) emergency stop; D) slow down; E) normal stop
options.d: A) straight ahead; B) chocks inserted; C) normal stop; D) slow down; E) emergency stop
